def: A class of Mollusca in which the anterior lobes of the foot aredeveloped in the form of broad, thin, winglike organs, with whichthey swim at near the surface of the sea.
To combine with arsenic; to treat or impregnate with arsenic.
Having (such) a tone; -- chiefly used in composition; as, high-toned; sweet-toned. Toned paper, paper having a slight tint, indistinction from paper which is quite white.
Having but one hand, or one workman; also, alone; unassisted.
An instrument for determining the depth of the sea water by itspressure.
A small horse of a breed raised at Galloway, Scotland; --called also garran, and garron.
